3.01.2025

BACK

YÖK President Prof. Dr. Erol ÖZVAR's Visit to TJU

TJU Council Member and President of the Council of Higher Education (YÖK), Prof. Dr. Erol ÖZVAR, visited our university to extend his congratulations to our new Rector, Prof. Dr. Mustafa Verşan KÖK, on his recent appointment.We express our gratitude for their kind visit.
